hero.h2: Enterprise-grade video generation API. The only officially sanctioned Seedance gateway — guaranteed throughput with configurable trust & safety.

shortDrama.title: Short drama production — ship shorts faster
shortDrama.description: Cut per-title cost and batch-produce vertical shorts with predictable throughput.
shortDrama.heroTitle: Ship shorts faster. Spend less per title.
shortDrama.heroSubtitle: NextAPI is the video generation backbone for short-drama studios batch-producing vertical content at scale.
shortDrama.pain1Desc: Rate limits on consumer APIs stall production calendars and break release schedules.
shortDrama.pain2Desc: Fragmented billing across providers makes unit economics impossible to forecast.
shortDrama.pain3Desc: Manual re-queueing wastes creative time that should go into scripts and cuts.
shortDrama.flowTitle: How a studio runs on NextAPI
shortDrama.step1Desc: Drop your shot list into our batch endpoint with consistent model and aspect-ratio parameters.
shortDrama.step2Desc: Lock in guaranteed parallelism with a monthly commit — your queue never backs up behind noisy neighbors.
shortDrama.step3Desc: Finished clips arrive via signed webhook or R2 bucket, ready for your NLE pipeline.
shortDrama.ctaTitle: Bring your current API bill and 3 prompts.
shortDrama.ctaSubtitle: We'll return a same-day benchmark against your existing stack — cost per title, throughput, latency.

adCreative.title: Ad creative automation — predictable cost at iteration scale
adCreative.description: Reserved throughput and bulk credits for Meta and TikTok creative teams running thousands of variants.
adCreative.heroTitle: Iterate ad creative without blowing the budget.
adCreative.heroSubtitle: Built for performance-marketing teams scaling creative testing across Meta, TikTok, and programmatic channels.
adCreative.painTitle: Why creative ops teams outgrow consumer APIs
adCreative.pain1Desc: Surge pricing and opaque token math make CAC modeling a guessing game.
adCreative.pain2Desc: The day you need 5,000 variants, your API is the slowest thing in the pipeline.
adCreative.pain3Desc: Prepaid top-ups via personal cards don't survive procurement review.
adCreative.flowTitle: How ad teams scale on NextAPI
adCreative.step1Desc: Commit monthly for guaranteed parallelism — size for launch day, not the baseline.
adCreative.step2Desc: Lock in per-second pricing for the quarter. CFO-friendly invoicing with tax ID.
adCreative.step3Desc: Webhooks deliver finished variants directly into your asset manager and ad platform.
adCreative.ctaTitle: Bring your current API bill and 3 prompts.
adCreative.ctaSubtitle: We'll model your variant economics and return a same-day benchmark.

aiApps.title: AI video apps — drop-in replacement for Fal and Replicate
aiApps.description: Uptime, webhooks, and migration speed for consumer AI products.
aiApps.heroTitle: Ship the app. We'll run the video.
aiApps.heroSubtitle: NextAPI is the infrastructure layer for consumer AI video apps — drop-in for Fal or Replicate in about 30 minutes.
aiApps.painTitle: What breaks AI video apps at scale
aiApps.pain1Desc: Your retention dies when the generation backend 503s during prime time.
aiApps.pain2Desc: Polling doesn't scale. Missing callbacks eat support tickets.
aiApps.pain3Desc: Rewriting your job runner every time a provider changes their API is tax on engineering.
aiApps.flowTitle: How AI video apps run on NextAPI
aiApps.step1Desc: Our request and response schema mirror the shapes you already use. Typical migration: 30 minutes.
aiApps.step2Desc: Signed HMAC-SHA256 delivery with exponential retry. No more polling loops.
aiApps.step3Desc: 99.9% SLA with credit rebates. Public status page. Transparent incident reports.
aiApps.ctaTitle: Migrate from Fal or Replicate in 30 minutes.
aiApps.ctaSubtitle: Send us your current integration and 3 prompts. We'll return a same-day benchmark.

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.description: Prepaid credits, committed-use discounts, and enterprise SLAs for Seedance at scale.
pricing.heading: Pricing built for procurement.
pricing.subheading: Prepaid credits, minimum monthly commits, 99.9% SLA, reserved throughput, and bring-your-own Cloudflare R2.
pricing.paygBlurb: No commit. Credit-card top-ups from $20. Perfect for prototypes.
pricing.growthBlurb: Prepaid credits with 10% committed-use discount and priority support.
pricing.scaleBlurb: Reserved throughput, SLA 99.9%, Slack support, bring-your-own R2.
pricing.enterpriseBlurb: Dedicated throughput, security review, custom DPA, 24/7 on-call.
pricing.featureInvoice: Invoice with company name, tax ID, billing email, country — available on all paid plans.

contact.heading: Request a same-day benchmark.
contact.subheading: Bring your current API bill and 3 prompts. We'll return cost-per-video, throughput, and latency numbers against your existing provider within one business day.
contact.name: Your name
contact.spend: Current monthly spend on video APIs

benchmark.title: Bring your current API bill and 3 prompts.
benchmark.subtitle: We'll return a same-day benchmark — cost per video, throughput, and latency against your existing provider.

migrate.title: Migrate to NextAPI
migrate.description: Drop-in migration from Fal, Replicate, or any video generation API. Typical migration: 30 minutes.
migrate.heroSubtitle: NextAPI is a drop-in replacement for Fal, Replicate, and other video generation APIs. Change your base URL, map a few parameters, and you're live.
migrate.step1Desc: Replace your existing provider URL with https://api.nextapi.top/v1. Your SDK client config is usually one line.
migrate.step2Desc: Our request schema mirrors common patterns: prompt, duration_seconds, resolution, mode. Map any provider-specific fields.
migrate.step3Desc: Every account gets a test key that uses sandbox credits. Validate your integration without spend risk.
migrate.step4Desc: Replace polling with one signed webhook endpoint. HMAC-SHA256 verification, exponential retry, delivery logs.
migrate.compatDesc: NextAPI offers production-grade features that consumer APIs don't — reserved throughput, idempotency, and full procurement support.
